case_title: JOSSIE GO VS. DORIS PANINCBATAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2015 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GO, JOSSIE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,300.00 FILED BY GO, JOSSIE AS TO DEFENDANT PANINCBATAN, DORIS PANINCBATAN, ADORCION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2015 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-22-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY TAGALOG INTERPRETER---DENNIS FERNANDEZ. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED AUG-12-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PANINCBATAN, ADORCION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED AUG-12-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PANINCBATAN, DORIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GO, JOSSIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PANINCBATAN, DORIS PANINCBATAN, ADORCION $6,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,375.00, DEFENDANTS DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF SUBSTANTIATED HER CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
